full_text:
Li Zheng 李整
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Zheng (李整)was born in Jiyin. Sent to collect his father’s troops, he defeated Xue Lan and Li Feng. Li Zheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
